name: fusion-agent-codex
description: Safe Codex plugin for the Fusion Agent CAD harness.

interface.shortDescription: Use the safe Fusion Agent CAD harness from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Fusion Agent Codex exposes the memory-backed, real-safe Fusion Agent harness through one safe MCP server. It routes CAD creation through the planner/verifier path, and routes diagnosis, hub inventory, compact snapshots, and risky changes through explicit guardrail tools instead of exposing raw Autodesk Fusion MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Create a compact snapshot of the active Fusion design.
Preview a safe Fusion cleanup batch.
